observation.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && for f in $(find test/cases -name "*.sysu.c" | sort); do /workspace/YatCC/llvm/install/bin/clang -cc1 -dump-tokens "$f" 2>&1 | grep -v "^#" | awk '{print $1}' | sort -u | tr '\n' ' '; echo " <- $f"; done 2>/dev/null | head -50
